PROP-baseauction-inv-041.text: Stale price data (beyond stalenessThreshold) must revert when validation enabled; prevents unfavorable trades.
PROP-baseauction-inv-041.assertion: forall _getAssetPrice(withValidation=true): updatedAt < now - threshold => revert StaleFeedData

locations.note: Staleness check gated on withValidation=true; compares updatedAt to block.timestamp - stalenessThreshold
